old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-85z6","title":"Implement link/SCHC wire-format v2","description":"Migrate Rust, Python, and Zephyr/C to the addressing specification's wire-format v2: signed link frames set I=S and carry short SenderID or 0xffff+IID; relays verify/mutate/re-sign; announce carries persistent origin epoch and independent replay high-water state; SCHC rule-set v2 uses native 0200::/8 residues and explicit RPL source IDs; multicast caches immutable packet IDs.
